description: Mock application packet: a first-time (Type A, 'new') Driver's License (DL) application filed by an adult applicant, category B (light passenger vehicle, non-professional, automatic transmission), driving skill acquired from a driving school. All values are fabricated illustrative test data, not a real person's information, constructed to exercise the schema's most common branch: licenseTypeApplied=drivers_license + typeOfApplication=new (revisionOfRecordsType and existingLicense*/previousName correctly not applicable), civilStatus=single (spouseName correctly not applicable), drivingSkillSource=driving_school (privateInstructorLicenseNumber correctly not applicable), isOrganDonor=true (organ checkboxes applicable), nameChangedFromPreviousLicense=false (previousName correctly not applicable).
